name: 1bu Flexible Diamond Round Laundry Basket Gray - Brightroom™: Polyethylene, 35.2L Capacity, Built-In Handles, Multipurpose
description:
Eliminate laundry day blues with the help of this Flexible Diamond Round Laundry Basket from Brightroom™. Featuring a deep round silhouette with an open top design, this laundry basket makes sorting through laundry a breeze. It's designed with two side cutout handles for easy lifting and carrying to the laundry room. Showcasing a diamond mesh design for ventilation, this laundry basket features a solid gray hue to coordinate with a variety of decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
